testcase.name: test_preamble
testcase.failure:

.0 = <list_iterator object at 0x103546aa0>

testcase.name: test_main
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.integration def test_main(): > assert speedtest.main() == 0 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration_test.py:28: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ cf_speedtest/speedtest.py:299: in main args = parser_with_args.parse_args(argv) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:1872: in parse_args self.error(msg % ' '.join(argv)) /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2630: in error self.exit(2, _('%(prog)s: error: %(message)s\n') % args) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = ArgumentParser(prog='__main__.py', usage=None, description=None, formatter_class=<class 'argparse.HelpFormatter'>, conflict_handler='error', add_help=True) status = 2 message = '__main__.py: error: unrecognized arguments: --durations-min=5.0 --rootdir /Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/So.../libmig_out.4o-mini/12932@cf-speedtest__78d9ee1d__requests__urllib3/0-premig/test-report.json --json-report-indent 2\n'
def exit(self, status=0, message=None): if message: self._print_message(message, _sys.stderr) > _sys.exit(status) E SystemExit: 2
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/argparse.py:2617: SystemExit
